compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval region in Panel E containing ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC neuron cells.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Blue triangle node inside NEURONS compartment, labeled ADF, with tph-1 gene label above it.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle node inside NEURONS compartment, labeled AWB, with ser-6 gene label above it.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon node inside NEURONS compartment, labeled URX, with mod-1 gene label above it; small dots/granules drawn around it.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red inverted-triangle/hexagon node inside NEURONS compartment, labeled RIC, with tbh-1 gene label above it; small dots/granules around it.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded rectangle box in Panel E containing nhr-76 → ATGL → β-oxidation / Fat loss pathway.

genes.snippet: Gene label above ADF neuron (blue triangle) in Panel E; also x-axis category in Panel B bar graph and genotype label in Panel A microscopy images.
Gene label above AWB neuron (green triangle) in Panel E.
Gene label above URX neuron (yellow hexagon) in Panel E; also referenced in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS in Panels C and D.
Gene label above RIC neuron (red hexagon) in Panel E.
First node in intestinal pathway in Panel E (inside INTESTINE compartment), connected by solid arrow to ATGL.
Middle node in intestinal pathway in Panel E (inside INTESTINE compartment); receives activation from nhr-76 and activates β-oxidation / Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Panel E: solid pointed arrow from ADF to URX labeled '5-HT', indicating serotonin-mediated activation of mod-1 in URX by tph-1 in ADF.
Panel E: solid pointed arrow from AWB to ADF (pointing upward), indicating AWB/ser-6 activates ADF/tph-1. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Panel E: solid pointed arrow from RIC to AWB labeled 'Oct', indicating octopamine-mediated activation of AWB/ser-6 by RIC/tbh-1.
Panel E: dashed arrow from URX pointing down-left toward RIC, indicating mod-1 in URX indirectly regulates tbh-1 in RIC.
Panel E: dashed arrow from URX to INTESTINE compartment, explicitly labeled 'endocrine signal', indicating indirect/long-range signaling from the URX neuron to the intestine.
Panel E: solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL inside INTESTINE compartment.

Panel E: solid pointed arrow from ATGL to 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' inside INTESTINE compartment, representing ATGL activating the β-oxidation / Fat loss process. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
